title: pityrogramma ornithopteris var. guianensis
intro: Pityrogramma ornithopteris var. guianensis is a variety of the Pityrogramma ornithopteris plant, also known as the Bird Wing or Feather Fern, which is a type of fern species belonging to the family Pteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pityrogramma ornithopteris var. guianensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or using them in a decoction, and are often used to treat wounds, burns, and skin irritations.
